messageLogic.notes: Titles are conclusions/questions, not labels (s2 「決算書が出てから動くのでは、半年遅い。」, s5 「月次で見ると、打ち手が早くなる」, s6 ask). Clean problem→insight→evidence→action arc (goal → 3 lenses → contrast → chart proof → single CTA). 1 slide/1 message throughout.

visualIntegrity.notes: Visual QA ran on all 6 slides: no overflow, no overlap, uniform 0.7" margins, strong contrast, aligned number-circle rows and cards. Zero AI-tells — no vertical bands, banners, or title underlines.

designFidelity.notes: One dominant neutral + single teal accent; sandwich (dark cover/CTA, light body); fully tokenized type and colour; consistent off-canvas oval motif on both dark slides. -1: motif appears only on the dark bookends (acceptable, but body could echo it lightly).

informationDesign.notes: Every slide carries a visual element (oval, big stat, number circles, tinted compare cards, native column chart, accent offer panel). Chart is native/editable with data labels; 6 bars read cleanly. -2: chart unit lives in the series name rather than a labelled axis.

contentIntegrity.notes: Estimates are honestly flagged (約60%…（イメージ）); CTA states 「無理な勧誘はいたしません」. Numbers are illustrative and not presented as audited fact. -1: the 60% figure has no cited basis (fine for a seminar hook, would need a source for an external data claim).

findings.issue: Chart unit (万円) is carried in the series name, not as an axis/value label.
findings.fix: Optional: keep the value axis hidden but add a small '（万円）' caption near the chart top-left, or append the unit to the takeaway.

verdict: Ship — cleared for external delivery (94/100). This is the reference pass-line deck: clean visual integrity, honest content, conclusion-titles, native chart. The single minor improvement (explicit chart unit) is optional and does not block delivery.
